source_detail: IEEE 1516.2 clause Annex B
requirement_text: DDM dimension processing shall support common normalization-function definitions where referenced by object models.
notes: Current repo-native evidence now directly proves parser/schema recognition and preservation of dimension normalization metadata
column15: but not full executable runtime normalization semantics for DDM routing values.

source_detail: IEEE 1516.2 clause Annex C
requirement_text: FOM/SOM module merger shall apply module-merging principles consistently for class hierarchies, datatypes, dimensions, and metadata.
notes: Current merge-principles tests directly prove compatible module composition and rejection of conflicting datatype and logical-time definitions, which is the repo-native execution surface for the Annex C merge-principles statement.
